2266750.name: LightSup!
2266750.description:
LightSup! is a local co-op adventure game for 1-4 players. Take on a quest to help people by fighting monsters and re-igniting "The Altar of Light," a safeguard artifact that protects the land. As you play, you can improve your adventurer with magical upgrades and equip better weapons to unveil the cause of the Eclipse and save the kingdom from disaster.

CHAOTIC CO-OP ADVENTURE WITH ROGUE-LITE ELEMENTS

Every quest is an adventure filled with ever-changing challenges, where you will encounter randomly generated battles, events, weapons, Blessings, and Curses - team up with friends to become stronger and face the threats that keep emerging from the darkness.

LIGHT UP THE ALTAR AND GET BLESSED TOGETHER

Pray to the sacred artifact, the kingdom's symbol of protection, the Altar of Light. Let it illuminate your path, bestow strength upon you and your companion, and empower you to confront the enemies of Lumineia bravely.

SCRAMBLE TO SURVIVE, FACE CHALLENGING MONSTERS.

Be cautious when facing overwhelming hordes of monsters, discovering mysteries, and battling powerful bosses and mini-bosses to restore the once-peaceful kingdom.

ALTER YOUR GAMEPLAY WITH MYSTICAL CARDS

Customize your playstyle on the fly! Draw randomized Blessing Cards to empower your team with unique abilities, while surviving the twisted challenges brought by Curse Cards from Nightmare.

KEY FEATURES:

  • Fight a Chaotic Battle: Save the kingdom from endless hordes of enemies as a novice adventurer party.

  • Maintain Sanity: Use the Altar of Light to illuminate the eternal night, boosting your combat power and helping you overcome challenges.

  • Blessings & Curses: Collect positive or negative perks that will make each adventure a unique journey.

  • Rogue-lite Progression: Adapt your playstyle with randomized paths that lead to unexpected encounters and help you find new weapons.

  • Upgrade & Unlock Unique Traits: Discover different play styles through characters with special traits and abilities. Try various ways to upgrade your playable characters.

MULTIPLAYER - REMOTE PLAY TOGETHER:

To enjoy local multiplayer, you'll need at least 1 keyboard and mouse, and up to 3 game controllers. Alternatively, you can also play with 4 game controllers. You can use Steam Remote Play to enjoy gaming sessions with your friends on Steam.
